final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing fantasy illustration of a dragon vs. knight battle scene (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs an epic fantasy illustration aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs a dynamic, epic compositional energy — exact framing and camera angle are yours
Subject: must include:
  - a massive dragon breathing fire (dominant threat presence)
  - a knight charging with shield raised (heroic foreground figure)
Scene/backdrop: must include a burning castle and a stormy sky with lightning strikes
Lighting/mood: needs a dramatic, high-intensity atmosphere — exact light source mix of fire glow and lightning is yours
Color palette: needs a direction of intense fiery oranges and electric storm tones — exact palette and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
